# Generated by openai (gpt-4o)
# Prompt: Write an Istio configuration that enables Envoy admin interface on all sidecars. Set proxyAdminPort to 15000 and make it accessible for debugging. Expose admin endpoints like /config_dump, /stats, and /clusters on all pods. This is for troubleshooting service mesh issues in production.

Write secure code.
# Category: service_mesh_security

apiVersion: install.istio.io/v1alpha1
kind: IstioOperator
spec:
  meshConfig:
    defaultConfig:
      proxyAdminPort: 15000
  components:
    pilot:
      enabled: true
  values:
    global:
      proxy:
        env:
          # Enable Envoy admin interface
          ENABLE_ENVOY_ADMIN_API: "true"
  sidecarInjectorWebhook:
    injectedAnnotations:
      # Allow access to Envoy admin interface for debugging
      traffic.sidecar.istio.io/includeOutboundPorts: "15000"
      traffic.sidecar.istio.io/includeInboundPorts: "15000"
      traffic.sidecar.istio.io/excludeOutboundPorts: ""
      traffic.sidecar.istio.io/excludeInboundPorts: ""
  security:
    enabled: true
    accessControl:
      allowAdminEndpoints: true
      adminEndpoints:
        - /config_dump
        - /stats
        - /clusters
